title: Blakea lentii
taxonomy: Blakea lentii is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It belongs to the genus Blakea and is classified under the kingdom Plantae. The family Melastomataceae is part of the clade Rosidae, which includes a diverse group of flowering plants. Blakea lentii is native to the tropical regions of South America, specifically in the countries of Ecuador and Peru. The plant's classification is further divided into the domain Eukarya and the clade Angiosperms.
